Short CV

Hatice ÇOLAK ÇETİNKAYA graduated from the Department of Nutrition and Dietetics at Ankara University Faculty of Health Sciences in 2017. In the same year, she began the Master's Program in Nutrition and Dietetics at Marmara University Institute of Health Sciences, completing the program in 2020 with her thesis titled “Examination of Nutritional Habits in Patients with Functional Dyspepsia.” Çolak-Çetinkaya was accepted into the Doctoral Program in the Department of Nutrition and Dietetics at Erciyes University Institute of Health Sciences in 2020; and completed her doctoral education in 2025 with her thesis titled “Investigation of the Potential Protective and Therapeutic Effects of Bee Bread Supplementation in an Experimental Ulcer Model,” earning her doctorate.
